vulnerability.payload: POST /static/uploads with Content-Type: image/png containing embedded PHP webshell
vulnerability.test_result: 200 OK - file uploaded and accessible at /static/uploads/shell.php, server executed PHP code
reproduction_steps: Navigate to the file upload feature at cdn.otherdomain.com/static/uploads
Upload a .php file disguised with a .png extension and image/png Content-Type
Access the uploaded file directly via URL
Observe that the server executes the PHP code instead of serving it as static content
